hero.title: Baram
hero.subtitle: AI Compliance Settlement Layer
hero.description: Every prompt encrypted. Every response encrypted. Every execution recorded. Every payment guaranteed.
hero.target: For developers, enterprises, and regulators who need AI they can prove.

ran.title: No Audit Trail
ran.detail: No tamper-proof record of what the agent actually ran.

budget.title: No Budget Control
budget.detail: Spending limits exist only in application code, not on-chain.

prove.title: No Proof
prove.detail: Internal logs are mutable. Auditors can't verify anything.

howMuch.label: HOW MUCH
howMuch.detail: Payment, fees, budget used, remaining balance

trust.label: HOW TRUSTWORTHY
trust.detail: Tier, reputation, stake, TEE status, attestation

chain.label: CHAIN
chain.detail: Trigger source and downstream action for full chain reconstruction

enforcement.title: Settlement and audit are inseparable by design.
enforcement.description: Hot-potato pattern: SettlementReceipt has no drop ability. The only way to consume it is to create an AER in the same transaction.

budget.headline: Seven layers of constraint. Enforced on-chain.

identity.name: Agent Identity
identity.rule: Only the authorized agent can spend

active.name: Active Status
active.rule: Owner can pause all spending instantly

timeWindows.title: Time-Window Spending Limits
timeWindows.daily: Daily — Maximum NUSDC in any 24-hour window

killSwitch.title: Kill Switch
killSwitch.description: Setting is_active to false instantly disables the agent. One transaction. No delay.

flow.headline: From request to receipt in one transaction.

register.title: Register Agent
register.subtitle: AgentProfile
register.detail: Create an AgentProfile on-chain linking your address to the agent

request.title: Request
request.subtitle: 7 Checks
request.detail: All 7 constraints verified on-chain. NUSDC locked in escrow.

assign.title: Assign Executor
assign.subtitle: Weighted Random
assign.detail: Filtered by tier, weighted by reputation

execute.title: AI Inference
execute.subtitle: Nitro Enclave
execute.detail: Prompt decrypted inside TEE, LLM runs, output hashed

settle.title: Settlement
settle.subtitle: Atomic PTB
settle.detail: NUSDC released, AER minted, reputation updated

hardware.title: Hardware Isolation
hardware.description: Prompts encrypted with RSA-OAEP, decrypted only inside AWS Nitro Enclave. Operator cannot read your data.

escrow.title: Escrow Settlement
escrow.description: NUSDC locked before execution. Auto-refund on timeout. Five-state machine enforced on-chain.

stake.title: Skin in the Game
stake.description: Executors stake NASUN. Timeout: 5% slashed. Bad attestation: 10%. Fraud: 100%.

compliance.title: Immutable Audit Trail
compliance.description: Every execution creates an AER. Hot-potato pattern makes settlement without a record impossible.

hardware.title: Trust Boundary
zones: Browser (Trusted) — Generates AES key, encrypts prompt, decrypts response
Host (Untrusted) — HTTP server + vsock proxy, sees only ciphertext
Enclave (Trusted) — Decrypts prompt, runs LLM, encrypts response
hardware.note: E2E encryption ensures only the user's browser and the TEE ever see plaintext.

states.completed: Proof verified, NUSDC released to executor
states.cancelled: Refund — user cancel or auto-cancel on failure

executor.headline: Trust through stake, reputation, and hardware.

staking.title: Staking & Slashing
staking.description: NASUN staked as collateral. Slashing only for provable on-chain violations.

tiers.title: Tier System
tiers.description: tier = min(stake_tier, reputation_tier). Both dimensions must qualify.

tee.title: TEE Privacy
tee.description: AWS Nitro Enclave. Prompt encrypted end-to-end. Key destroyed on shutdown.

slashingTable.dormancy: Executors inactive for 30 days lose 50 reputation per period.

security.headline: Guaranteed by smart contracts — not by policy.

invariants.aer: AER is always created when settlement occurs.
invariants.budget: Every agent request goes through all seven checks.
invariants.killSwitch: Kill switch is instant. No delay on next transaction.
invariants.timeWindows: Daily, weekly, monthly limits enforced automatically.
invariants.executor: AER Executor field always matches the transaction sender.

regulations.koreaDetail: Accountability frameworks for AI systems. $7.27B government AI allocation.
regulations.euDetail: Mandatory audit trail requirements for high-risk AI systems.
regulations.gapDetail: No one provides tamper-proof audit trails for AI agents. Baram competes on accountability.

gtm.headline: Bottom-up adoption. Proof before partnerships.

beta.title: Developer Beta
beta.detail: BetaAccessNFT-gated access for AI agent developers. AER generation free during beta.

sdk.title: SDK Integration
sdk.detail: Framework plugins for LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen. Configuration change, not architecture change.

enterprise.title: Enterprise Inbound
enterprise.detail: Regulatory deadlines drive natural demand. Live system + developer ecosystem.

network.title: Network Growth
network.detail: More demand, more executors, better pricing. Staking locks NSN supply.

gtm.target: 2026 Target: 10,000 AER records generated by independent developers during beta.

cta.headline: Live on Devnet.
cta.description: Core contracts deployed. End-to-end flow proven. Inspect it yourself.
